name: labmate
description: Your AI labmate for the full research lifecycle: reading papers, running experiments, writing reports, and maintaining project knowhow.

interface.shortDescription: Research lifecycle skills for papers, experiments, and project knowhow.
interface.longDescription: Labmate packages research workflow skills for initializing projects, reading papers, surveying literature, launching experiments, monitoring runs, analyzing results, visualizing outputs, and maintaining project documentation.
defaultPrompt: Read this paper and extract research value.
